summary: Comprehensive testing of Inventory Item Master Data (Item Settings) feature - all tests passed. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passed (CRUD, validations, reorder integration). Frontend: All UI flows verified (Item Settings tab, form, table, edit button, Reorder tab threshold/buffer columns).

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-items/settings - Create new item settings (200)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-items/settings - Create with zero threshold/buffer (200)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-items/settings - Update existing via upsert (200)
Backend: GET /api/inventory-items/settings?customer_id=X - List all settings (200)
Backend: GET /api/inventory-items/settings?customer_id=X&item=Y - Filter by item (200)
Backend: GET /api/inventory-items/settings - Missing customer_id returns 422
Backend: POST validation - Negative threshold returns 422
Backend: POST validation - Negative buffer returns 422
Backend: POST validation - Empty item returns 422
Backend: POST validation - Whitespace-only item returns 422
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/reorder-recommendations - Returns threshold/buffer columns
Backend: Reorder recommendations - Uses custom settings when configured (has_settings=true)
Backend: Reorder recommendations - Falls back to defaults when no settings (has_settings=false)
Backend REGRESSION: Balances endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Movements endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Incoming supply endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Summary endpoint still works
Frontend: Login with admin/admin successful
Frontend: Navigate to Inventory Ledger page
Frontend: Hormel Foods workspace loads
Frontend: Item Settings tab visible (data-testid='inv-tab-settings')
Frontend: Item Settings panel loads (data-testid='inv-settings-panel')
Frontend: Form fields present: Item, Threshold, Buffer, Notes inputs
Frontend: Save button present and functional (data-testid='inv-settings-save')
Frontend: Settings table displays saved items (data-testid='inv-settings-table')
Frontend: Edit button works (data-testid='inv-settings-edit-{i}')
Frontend: Edit populates form with existing values, item field disabled
Frontend: Update saves correctly (toast: 'Settings saved for SPAM-LITE')
Frontend: Reorder tab shows Threshold column
Frontend: Reorder tab shows Buffer column
Frontend: Reorder tab shows custom settings (SPAM-LITE: threshold=600, buffer=150)
Frontend REGRESSION: Balances tab loads correctly
Frontend REGRESSION: Movements tab loads correctly
Frontend REGRESSION: Incoming tab loads correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_items.py: Proper upsert pattern with find_one + update_one/insert_one
Backend: Correct validation order - negative check before empty item check
Backend inventory_ledger.py: Settings lookup via settings_map dict for O(1) access
Backend: Formula implemented correctly: recommended_qty = max(0, threshold - available) + buffer
Frontend: ItemSettingsPanel uses controlled form state with setEditRow
Frontend: Edit mode correctly disables item field (existing: true flag)
Frontend: Reorder table headers include Threshold and Buffer columns (Lines 339-340)
Frontend: Good UX - toast notifications on save ('Settings saved for {item}')
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (ID: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Created test item settings during backend tests. Edited SPAM-LITE settings during frontend test (threshold: 600, buffer: 150).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Item Settings feature fully tested. Endpoints: POST/GET /api/inventory-items/settings. Frontend: Item Settings tab (data-testid='inv-tab-settings') in CustomerWorkspace. Form testids: inv-settings-item, inv-settings-threshold, inv-settings-buffer, inv-settings-notes, inv-settings-save. Table testids: inv-settings-table, inv-settings-row-{i}, inv-settings-edit-{i}. Reorder tab now shows Threshold and Buffer columns. DB collection: inv_item_settings with schema {customer_id, item, reorder_threshold, safety_buffer, notes, created_at, updated_at}.
